title: github-empty-repo-bootstrap
pitch: CLI that turns an empty GitHub account into a polished open-source-ready project skeleton.
keyFeatures: Generates TS package scaffold (tsconfig, eslint, vitest, build scripts)
Creates CI workflows (tests, release, changelog, provenance)
Interactive prompts for package name, license, and publish settings
targetUsers: New open-source maintainers who want to publish a first npm package with best-practice defaults.
